name: property managers handling 5–15 tenant applications/month tool
description: For property managers handling 5–15 tenant applications/month, inefficient management causes delays in tenant placement. We streamline the application process instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem_solved: inefficient management of tenant applications and property listings
